title: eriosolena composita
intro: Eriosolena composita, also known as Himalayan Balsam, is a perennial herb native to the Himalayas and parts of Europe. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiseptic properties, which make it useful for treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Eriosolena composita include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Eriosolena composita include tea infusions, tinctures, and essential oil extracts, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
